location_precision.why: Every finding carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is described in isolation with no compound failure mode linking two separate defects—the closest (leaked handle from early return) is internal to a single finding, not an interaction between defects.

causal_clarity.why: Essentially every finding states the mechanism, e.g. 'Mutable default argument seen=[] is shared across calls, so IDs accumulated in one invocation cause those users to be silently skipped in every later call.'

location_precision.why: Every one of the six findings carries a precise file:line (e.g. `src/sync.py:14`, `src/report.py:11`).

interaction_synthesis.why: Each defect is described in isolation; even the potentially-linked swallowing at `sync.py:39` and the exceptions at `report.py:11` are never connected into a compound failure mechanism.

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the failure mechanism or triggering condition, e.g. `seen=[]` is 'shared across calls, so IDs accumulated in one invocation cause those users to be silently skipped in every later call.'
